name: Request VM with Approval
description: Request VM via GitOps with GitLab-based approval

functions.name: buildManifests
functions.operation:
{
            vm_yaml: "apiVersion: kubevirt.io/v1
kind: VirtualMachine
metadata:
  name: " + .vm_name + "
  namespace: " + .vm_namespace + "
spec:
  runStrategy: Always
  dataVolumeTemplates:
    - apiVersion: cdi.kubevirt.io/v1beta1
      kind: DataVolume
      metadata:
        name: " + .vm_name + "
      spec:
        sourceRef:
          kind: DataSource
          name: " + .vm_image + "
          namespace: openshift-virtualization-os-images
        storage:
          accessModes: [ReadWriteMany]
          resources:
            requests:
              storage: 30Gi
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        kubevirt.io/domain: " + .vm_name + "
    spec:
      architecture: amd64
      domain:
        cpu:
          cores: 1
          sockets: " + (.vm_cpu_sockets|tostring) + "
          threads: 1
          maxSockets: 8
        memory:
          guest: " + .vm_memory + "
        devices:
          disks:
            - disk:
                bus: virtio
              name: rootdisk
            - disk:
                bus: virtio
              name: cloudinitdisk
          interfaces:
            - masquerade: {}
              name: default
      networks:
        - name: default
          pod: {}
      volumes:
        - dataVolume:
            name: " + .vm_name + "
          name: rootdisk
        - cloudInitNoCloud:
            userData: |
              #cloud-config
              user: cloud-user
              password: demo-pass
              chpasswd: { expire: False }
              packages: [qemu-guest-agent]
              runcmd: [systemctl enable --now qemu-guest-agent]
          name: cloudinitdisk",
            kustomization_yaml: "apiVersion: kustomize.config.k8s.io/v1beta1
kind: Kustomization
resources:
  - virtualmachine.yaml
commonLabels:
  app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: argocd
  demo: virt-portal
  environment: " + .vm_namespace + "
  cost-center: CC-001"
        }

functions.name: successResult
functions.operation: { "result": { "message": "VM " + .vm_name + " manifests committed to GitLab. ArgoCD will sync and create the VM.", "outputs": [{"key": "GitLab Repo", "value": $SECRET.GITLAB_URL + "/vm-instances/" + .vm_name, "format": "link"}, {"key": "Approval Issue", "value": $SECRET.GITLAB_URL + "/demo/vm-approvals/-/issues/" + (.gitlabIssueResult.iid|tostring), "format": "link"}] } }

arguments.title: "[VM Request] " + .vm_name + " in " + .vm_namespace
arguments.description:
"## VM Request
| Param | Value |
|---|---|
| Name | " + .vm_name + " |
| Namespace | " + .vm_namespace + " |
| Image | " + .vm_image + " |
| CPU | " + (.vm_cpu_sockets|tostring) + " |
| Memory | " + .vm_memory + " |

Close with **approved** or **denied** label."
